description: SDK build marathon v34–v48 + improvement waves v49–v54 (Fas 24 färdigställande)

waves.title: MOD-WIDGET v3 — standalone widget board + Android
waves.plan: Slutför MOD-WIDGET v3: WidgetModulerPage, board, Android ModulerWidgetProvider. Bevara @locked. smoke:widgets PASS.

waves.title: Navigation P0 — Liv och göra flikar + drawer accordion
waves.plan: P0: Fixa flikar Ekonomi, MåBra, Kompasser i Liv och göra (tryck ska byta tab). Hamburgermeny: accordion med undermenyer från navTruth (Pontus godkänd). smoke:e2e-live PASS.

waves.title: Premium UI polish — Executive Midnight
waves.plan: Premium UI pass: tokens, calm cards, design-debt 0. Ingen redesign — polish only.

waves.title: Planering — hybrid widget + Fyren
waves.plan: Planering P3: hybrid-widget, FyrenWidgetBar, Morgonkompassen. Bevara Locked UX § Planering.

waves.title: Valv — Mönster, Orkester, evidence UI
waves.plan: Valv Z1: WORM evidence, Mönster/Orkester, plausible deniability. Ingen cross-RAG.

waves.title: Familjen — Barnfokus, Hamn, Livslogg
waves.plan: Familjen Z3: Barnfokus, Trygg Hamn, Livslogg. Barnporten kanon-UI = PMIR SKIP.

waves.title: Integration dry-run — innehåll + seed
waves.plan: Integration: smoke:innehall, content-waves, preflight. Aldrig --apply.

waves.title: Governance sync — docs + module lock
waves.plan: Governance: PROJECT_STATE, TODO, LOCK-MANIFEST, smoke:governance PASS.

waves.title: Slutgate — yolo-vakt GO/NO-GO
waves.plan: Read-only slutgate: smoke:predeploy:build. GO/NO-GO eval. Ingen deploy.

waves.title: Kopplingar C — ADK/synapse wiring
waves.plan: Kopplingar batch C: synapser, journal_woven optIn, drive ingest dry-run.

waves.title: Projekt P1 — repo hygiene + drift
waves.plan: Projekt P1: drift-smokes, journal-2d, mabra. Minimal fix om FAIL.

waves.title: Evolution ledger — infinite evolution sync
waves.plan: Evolution ledger eval + smoke:evolution dry-run.

waves.title: Arkiv batch — tre silos dry-run
waves.plan: Arkiv batch: kunskap/valv/barnen silo guard. Ingen cross-RAG, ingen --apply.

waves.title: Minne prep + prod deploy hosting
waves.plan: Minne prep (dry-run only — ingen --apply). Slutgate + hosting deploy om SDK_YOLO_UNATTENDED=1 och smoke PASS.

waves.title: Post-main-sync — App Check + Valv kickout verify
waves.plan: Efter main-sync (PR #226): verifiera App Check live-harden + Valv bakgrundslås. Kör smoke:android-platform + smoke:valv-security + smoke:predeploy:build. Minimal fix vid FAIL. Hosting deploy endast med Pontus OK. Ingen App Check Enforce. Ingen --apply.

waves.title: Soft debt — orphan UI, PDF-CTA, SPEC-synk, state hygiene
waves.plan: Rensa orphan HjartatHero (mock-data). Ta bort disabled PDF-CTA i JournalArchiveToolbar utan ny export. Synka stale SPEC/register-rader. Status-hygien v34–v48 → completed. Ingen rules, ingen locked UX-ombyggnad.

waves.title: Valv + Hjärtat finish — verify + minimal fix
waves.plan: Verify+minimal fix: Valv kickout/App Check paths, Inkast HITL, Speglar ZF, offline write-policy. Ingen firestore.rules, ingen Genkit, ingen Privacy 2.1. Live vault-worm/inkast/speglar deferred till App Check debug token OK (G85 parallel).

waves.title: Vardagen + Familjen finish — widgets HITL Hamn
waves.plan: Widget phone-size/routes verify. Barnporten HITL re-verify (ingen auto-promote). Hamn copy om smoke gap. Ekonomi checklist-doc. Inte Gmail/Calendar, Familje-PIN, /gora. Live smoke:children deferred till App Check debug token OK.

waves.title: Backend harden — Weaver U1 + manifest + functions-diff
waves.plan: 1) Diff functions:list vs index.ts → docs/evaluations deploy-gap. 2) Weaver RAG: journal/reality_vault utan kampspar/kb_docs i samma kontext. 3) SynapseTrigger + kasam_aggregation i manifest.ts. 4) Ingen firestore.rules/storage.rules/sharedRules.

waves.title: UX polish + Android cap sync
waves.plan: Elevate-only: dock-clearance, aria-labels, token-hex i touchade filer. cap sync. Bevara SacredLock/SecurePrefs/pinning/verifySecurityComponents.

waves.title: Slutgate — predeploy + yolo-vakt GO/NO-GO
waves.plan: smoke:predeploy:build. Eval GO/NO-GO i docs/evaluations. Hosting/functions deploy SKIP tills Pontus skriver OK deploy. Ingen App Check Enforce.
